sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκφεύγω

- Transliteration: Ekpheugo

- Phonetic: ek-fyoo'-go

- Definition:

1. to flee out of, flee away

a. to seek safety in flight

b. to escape

- Origin: from G1537 and G5343

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5343; to flee out: - escape flee.
